Thunderstone  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +10 AGI: +5
SV MAGIC: +15
WT: 0.5 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Thunderstone
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 DEX: +5 STA: +10 AGI: +5
SV MAGIC: +15
WT: 0.5 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Mynlaeni
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-11 08:55:54
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Lord Feshlak


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded January 29th, 2022 by halfridge

Post Comment
umm..no?
QuoteReply
# May 24 2002 at 11:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776466634
138 posts
to the comment below, hell no, these would suck for warriors..

can you say HP? Get a War Bow of Rallos Zek or Cazic Thule's brain and let it go to a monk or ranger or rogue, someone who really needs the ac..actually, anyone who needs the ac, paladins and shadowknights included would use this..but warriors can reach hard ac cap far too easily to waist DKP on this item
▲ Page top
RE: umm..no?
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2002 at 4:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250836089
121 posts
I wouldn't even loot this for the novelty of having them, and I'm an SK.

/wave AC cap. Why hello there... You certainly were easy to get to.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 07 2001 at 12:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) yes i know exactly what creature has it, and where it can be found... the item looks really nice on my monk too... to keep the game fun, its on a really big *** creature, and it con's red to level 60 players.. might even con red to level 70 players if we could go that high.. in order to get to this you must kill about 40 red con's which are like really bad but not as bad as the 5 really big *** red con's that are also in the way.. and its in a zone where you need much more players then you would need for a fear and hate raid combined.. enjoy...
Nice Tank/Hybrid item
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 7:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591753123059
117 posts
this item would be nice for a War/Monk/hybrid...the added Str agi/dex sta and the Magic Resist is great also...but does anyone know where this drop
▲ Page top

# Jul 11 2001 at 8:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248306816
7 posts
Is this the same Thunderstone that evolves Pikachu into Raichu? If so, does that mean there's a quest to evolve pikachu? I haven't seen any Pokemon NPCs ingame... must be a broken quest.
▲ Page top
RE: Hold on a second...
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 11:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757113487
Scholar
119 posts
bad thing is....we know it's not your siblings cards scattered all over your room.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 12 2001 at 8:22 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) econd...
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 12 2001 at 12:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yup, it is the same Thunderstone. All that hullabaloo about the Beastmaster in Luclin...Beastmaster is just VI's little codename for the Pokemon Master! The uber pet class. Though, you thought buying spell components for stuff like Summon Corpse was bad...think about buying Pokeballs! And watch out Sleeper...it's Mewtwo!
RE: Hold on a second...
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 6:18 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum

We all know you guys watch pokemon, don't lie. hehe. All in all tho this is not a bad range slot item to have, nice ac good stats great resist and a nice itby weight.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 11 2001 at 8:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I got this yesterday while camping orc 1 in EC. I heard they dropped there so i gave it a try and saw 3 drop in 8 kills. :)

▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 5:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248322158
282 posts
Man the equipment list from ToV is just insane. Not just the stats on the items, but the number of them... there seems to be a never-ending supply of new increasingly-uber items from this place.
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 9:01 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749811190
Sage
295 posts
There's a lot. You have 15 bosses in ToV North (The 11 pet dragons of vulak, Dagarn, Vulak, Eashen, and Ikatiar), named drakes that drop a number of random items, and then the 3 dragons in West ToV. All the North ToV dragons have huge loot tables - you can see a pretty big variety of items.
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2001 at 9:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753934230
215 posts
On top of that, it's the sheer variety of items that is coming from this place that's making my head spin with possibilities... guess this lends more to what I've been hearing about the Temple of Veeshan being a repository for relics and other items...
▲ Page top
